name: Mussels Marinara
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean 2 lbs of mussels in water and black pepper for an hour, then drain.
2. Remove the beards from the mussels.
3. In a large pan, sauté garlic in 2 tablespoons olive oil over low heat.
4. Add basil leaves, Italian seasoning, red pepper flakes, parsley, onions, and mushrooms. Everything should be fresh, especially the mushrooms. Add ingredients to taste; I add more for full flavor.
5. Sauté for 15 minutes.
6. Add 2-1 lb cans or larger of peeled tomatoes. Break the tomatoes with your hands and blend.
7. Cover and simmer for 1 hour, stirring frequently.
8. Add 2 fresh diced tomatoes and cook for another 10-15 minutes.
9. Add 1/4-1/2 cup of dry red wine and cook for another 10 minutes.
10. Do not overheat or let the sauce dry out. I prefer a watery sauce as it enhances the flavor.
11. Adjust seasonings to taste throughout cooking.
12. Use freshly grated Parmesan and Romano cheese for topping, then add everything on top of cooked pasta.
13. Serve with a dark green salad and a slightly chilled Chianti red wine. Enhance the evening with candlelight and classical guitar music.
Note: Adjust seasonings according to your liking as I cook according to taste. Get rave reviews for this dish! Enjoy!
